cases.title: Scenario matrix row for manual fallback operability under degradation scenarios
preconditions: Testing-plan §12 Manual correction and governance block and §11 NFR-16/NFR-17 verification rows apply (FR-20, FR-21, FR-29, BR-14/15/16, AC-13, AC-14, AC-19, AC-25).
attendance-open-session fixture exists with enrolled students and assigned Lecturer.
Degradation profiles are seeded: GpsDisabled failed attempt, network-unavailable student (no successful check-in), and session close with Absent finalization.
steps: For each degradation profile, confirm student has no successful QR check-in and failed CheckInAttempt or Pending/Absent roster state is persisted.
Assigned Lecturer within manualEditWindow invokes manual correction to Manual Present with documented reason per BR-14.
Query AttendanceRecord, AuditLog, and CheckInAttempt history for each resolved student.
Verify no correction bypasses reason capture or scope checks per WOP-04.
cases.expected: Manual fallback operability gate coverage row passes: lecturer resolves attendance for device/network/GPS failure scenarios without bypassing audit requirements (actor, old/new status, reason, timestamp per BR-22) and without cross-section scope expansion per BR-14 and NFR-17.

cases.title: Manual fallback after GPS failure commits attendance update and audit row atomically
preconditions: Real database transaction boundary spans attendance ledger, policy service, and audit modules.
Open gps-required session exists; enrolled student has failed GpsDisabled CheckInAttempt and Pending AttendanceRecord.
Assigned Lecturer is within manualEditWindow; policy mandates reason for corrections (VR-MC-04).
steps: Capture beforeState: AttendanceRecord status Pending, checkInMethod null, one failed CheckInAttempt with outcome GpsDisabled.
Invoke PATCH attendance correction through application service with status Manual Present, reason, sourceAttemptId linking failed attempt, and Idempotency-Key.
Query attendance_records, audit_logs, and check_in_attempts within same transaction scope.
Verify correlationId ties API response, audit entry, and realtime event.
cases.expected: Single transaction commits AttendanceRecord afterState Manual Present with checkInMethod Manual; exactly one audit_logs row records actorUserId, role Lecturer, oldStatus Pending, newStatus Manual Present, reason, and occurredAt; prior GpsDisabled attempt is preserved and not deleted per WOP-04 and AC-25 operability gate.

cases.title: SM-03 Absent to Manual Present transition after close when student could not self check-in
preconditions: Lecturer opened session via POST /v1/class-sessions/{sessionId}/open (AC-01) then closed via /close (AC-05).
Enrolled student had no successful check-in due to device/network failure; close finalization assigned Absent (AC-12, BR-13).
Assigned Lecturer is within manualEditWindow per effective policy.
steps: Capture beforeState: session state Closed, AttendanceRecord status Absent, checkInMethod system-assigned.
Lecturer executes manual correction command with status Manual Present and reason documenting in-person verification after network failure.
Capture afterState for AttendanceRecord and verify session remains Closed.
Query audit_logs for mutation entry with old Absent and new Manual Present.
cases.expected: beforeState Absent transitions to afterState Manual Present via lecturer manual fallback; session stays Closed (no illegal SM-01 reopen); transition is fully auditable per BR-14 and satisfies AC-25 without bypassing audit trail.

cases.title: Parallel manual fallback corrections for multiple GPS-failed students each write independent audit rows
preconditions: Open session has three enrolled students each with distinct failed GpsDisabled or OutOfRadius CheckInAttempt and Pending roster state.
Assigned Lecturer is within edit window with valid bearer token.
Real database with audit_logs immutability constraints.
steps: Issue three concurrent PATCH /v1/class-sessions/{sessionId}/attendance/{studentUserId} requests with distinct Idempotency-Key values, status Manual Present, and per-student reasons.
Await all responses and query AttendanceRecord and audit_logs for each student-session pair.
Verify each correction links to the correct student without cross-row mutation.
Confirm failed CheckInAttempt rows remain intact for all three students.
cases.expected: All three parallel corrections succeed independently; each student receives Manual Present status with exactly one audit row; no audit gap or merged mutation under concurrent lecturer fallback operations per NFR-17 supportability under classroom peak conditions.

cases.title: PATCH /v1/class-sessions/{sessionId}/attendance/{studentUserId} returns 200 after GPS failure scenario
preconditions: Open gps-required session exists; student POST /v1/check-ins returned 422 GpsDisabled (AC-09).
Assigned Lecturer bearer token is authenticated; manual edit window is active.
Student AttendanceRecord is Pending on roster with rejectedAttempts count incremented.
steps: Lecturer calls PATCH /v1/class-sessions/{sessionId}/attendance/{studentUserId} with body {"status": "Manual Present", "reason": "Sinh vien co mat, thiet bi khong cap GPS."} and Idempotency-Key header.
Inspect HTTP status 200, standard response envelope (data/meta/error), and error is null.
Call GET /v1/class-sessions/{sessionId}/attendance and locate corrected student row.
Query GET /v1/audit-logs filtered by targetId and actionType for manual attendance update.
cases.expected: PATCH returns HTTP 200 with envelope showing updated attendanceStatus Manual Present and checkInMethod Manual; audit query returns entry with oldStatus Pending, newStatus Manual Present, actor, reason, and timestamp confirming operability without audit bypass.

cases.title: WF-05 primary workflow resolves GPS-failed student via lecturer manual fallback with full audit
preconditions: Lecturer opened gps-required session (AC-01); session is Open with rotating QR.
Student completes login (AC-06) but check-in fails with GpsDisabled due to device permission denial (AC-09, E2E-05).
Manual edit window is active; assigned Lecturer bearer token is available.
steps: Student calls POST /v1/check-ins without usable GPS; verify 422 GpsDisabled and Pending roster state.
Lecturer reviews GET /v1/class-sessions/{sessionId}/attendance showing student Pending with latestAttemptOutcome GpsDisabled.
Lecturer submits PATCH correction to Manual Present with documented reason after in-person verification.
AcademicAdmin queries GET /v1/audit-logs for the correction event.
cases.expected: WF-05 primary happy path completes under GPS degradation: attendance resolves to Manual Present; failed attempt history preserved; audit record is queryable with actor/time/old/new/reason per AC-25 Given/When/Then and NFR-17.

cases.title: Alternate branch network failure leaves student Absent at close then lecturer manual fallback resolves
preconditions: Open session exists; enrolled student cannot reach API (simulated network outage) and has no CheckInAttempt or success record.
Lecturer closes session via POST /v1/class-sessions/{sessionId}/close (AC-05); close assigns Absent (AC-12).
Manual edit window from session close is active per BR-14.
steps: Verify GET /v1/class-sessions/{sessionId}/attendance shows student Absent after close with zero successful check-in attempts.
Lecturer verifies student was physically present and submits PATCH correction to Manual Present with reason citing network failure.
Refresh roster via GET /v1/class-sessions/{sessionId}/attendance.
Query audit trail for committed mutation.
cases.expected: Manual fallback resolves network-degraded scenario post-close: status changes Absent to Manual Present within edit window; SessionClosed blocks further self check-in (BR-02) but lecturer correction path remains operable with full audit per RSK-02 mitigation and AC-25.

cases.title: Flow C audit verification after manual fallback in multi-failure classroom drill
preconditions: Closed session with mixed failure trail: one GpsDisabled student, one ExpiredQr student (Pending), one network-absent student (Absent at close).
Assigned Lecturer applies in-window corrections for all three with distinct reasons.
Audit query endpoint available to AcademicAdmin or SystemAuditor read scope.
steps: Record roster statuses before corrections via GET /v1/class-sessions/{sessionId}/attendance.
Lecturer applies three PATCH corrections resolving each failure profile to Manual Present with documented reasons.
Query GET /v1/audit-logs with filters targetType AttendanceRecord, classSessionId, and time range covering corrections.
Verify each audit payload against CMP-01 minimum fields from roles-permissions doc §7.1.
cases.expected: Each committed manual fallback mutation has corresponding audit record with actor, role, target student/session, old status, new status Manual Present, reason, and timestamp; zero audit gaps across degradation scenarios per BR-22, AC-19, and AC-25 audit non-bypass requirement.

cases.title: Manual fallback without required reason returns ReasonRequired and preserves unresolved attendance
preconditions: Open session with student Pending after GpsDisabled failure; assigned Lecturer is within edit window.
Effective policy mandates reason for all manual corrections (VR-MC-04).
Lecturer bearer token is authenticated.
steps: Call PATCH /v1/class-sessions/{sessionId}/attendance/{studentUserId} with status Manual Present and empty or omitted reason field.
Inspect HTTP status and error.code in response envelope.
Query AttendanceRecord and audit_logs for the student-session pair.
Retry with valid reason as control confirming fallback path still operable.
cases.expected: Request is rejected with validation error ReasonRequired (400 class); AttendanceRecord remains Pending; no audit_logs mutation entry for failed attempt proving audit requirements cannot be bypassed; control request with reason succeeds resolving attendance per AC-25.

cases.title: Student, SystemAuditor, ITAdmin, and out-of-scope Lecturer denied manual fallback mutation
preconditions: Open or closed session in section A with student Pending after GpsDisabled failure; manual edit window is active.
Student, SystemAuditor, ITAdmin bearer tokens and Lecturer token for unassigned section B are available.
Assigned Lecturer token for section A is available as authorized control.
steps: Student calls PATCH /v1/class-sessions/{sessionId}/attendance/{studentUserId} with status Manual Present and reason.
SystemAuditor calls the same PATCH for section A session.
ITAdmin calls the same PATCH without explicit academic grant.
Out-of-scope Lecturer (section B) calls the same PATCH for section A session.
Assigned Lecturer calls the same PATCH as control.
Verify AttendanceRecord state after all denied attempts.
cases.expected: Student, SystemAuditor, and ITAdmin receive 403 Forbidden per permission matrix; out-of-scope Lecturer receives 403 OutOfScope per PRM-01; no attendance mutation or audit write from denied roles; assigned Lecturer control succeeds resolving Pending to Manual Present without broadening unauthorized access per AC-25.

cases.title: Lecturer live roster resolves GPS-failed student via ManualCorrectionDialog after degradation
preconditions: Lecturer is authenticated on desktop browser (PG-06 live roster) for assigned section.
Open gps-required session displays student row Pending with latestAttemptOutcome GpsDisabled badge.
Manual edit window is active; reason field is required (FRM-08).
steps: Navigate to /lecturer/sessions/{id}/roster and locate Pending student with GPS rejection summary.
Open ManualCorrectionDialog from row action; select Manual Present in status dropdown.
Enter reason in labeled Lý do textarea documenting device/GPS failure verification.
Confirm via dialog submit and observe AttendanceStatusCell updates to Manual Present success variant.
Verify summary chips refresh and dialog closes with focus return to trigger.
cases.expected: Browser FLOW-08 completes under degradation: form gating enforces required reason before submit; post-save roster shows Manual Present badge; UI state matches API correction and audit write; manual fallback is operable without bypassing governance controls per AC-25.

cases.title: Student check-in failure UI surfaces manual fallback guidance linking to lecturer resolution path
preconditions: Student is logged in on mobile-web browser (PG-02) for gps-required open session.
Browser geolocation permission is denied simulating device GPS failure.
Lecturer roster session is open on separate browser context for post-fallback verification.
steps: Navigate to check-in URL with valid token for gps-required session.
Deny browser location permission when GpsPermissionPrompt appears.
Submit check-in and observe CheckInResultScreen failure-gps-denied alert with recovery steps.
Verify copy includes lecturer manual fallback guidance (e.g. báo giảng viên).
Switch to lecturer roster context and confirm student appears Pending with correction affordance.
cases.expected: Student-facing degradation UX communicates recovery path including lecturer manual fallback; student remains Pending without success state; lecturer roster shows same student ready for ManualCorrectionDialog confirming end-to-end operability chain per AC-25 and NFR-17.

cases.title: Campus support manual fallback operational drill with physical devices and runbook
preconditions: Incident response playbook for check-in degradation (network instability, token service errors, GPS anomalies) is documented per NFR-17.
Staging pilot uses real classroom with iOS Safari or Android Chrome on campus Wi-Fi per testing-plan §6.2.
Lecturer and enrolled students have physical devices; Playwright MCP harness cannot reproduce full operational drill.
steps: Simulate classroom degradation scenario (GPS denied or network outage) on physical student devices.
Lecturer follows runbook steps: verify failed attempts on roster, apply manual fallback with reason for affected students.
Support operator verifies audit entries are queryable for dispute resolution walkthrough.
Document drill completion evidence per testing-plan §11 NFR-16/NFR-17 minimum evidence.
cases.expected: Operational drill confirms manual fallback procedures are rehearsed and attendance can be resolved in real classroom conditions without bypassing audit requirements or broadening unauthorized access; evidence satisfies AC-25 release readiness checklist §4.2.
